place: Chaweng Beach, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Beachfront Villa with 23-Metre Lap Pool & Private Clubhouse, Chaweng
blurb: A beachfront retreat at the quiet northern tip of Chaweng, facing Matlang Island — 860 m² of pavilion living, a 23-metre lap pool with a sunken sala, a spacious shorefront lawn and access to a private clubhouse with gym, cinema, spa and kids' club.
detail:
At the tip of Chaweng Beach, set directly on the sand and facing little Matlang Island, this is a beachfront escape that merges modern luxury with tropical charm. Across 860 m² of elegant living it accommodates up to sixteen guests in six bedrooms, each with a king bed, Smart TV and a private en-suite — several with open-air outdoor bathtubs — making it a natural fit for families and groups, with the flexibility to book four, five or six bedrooms.

The heart of the villa is a 23-metre lap pool with a shallow children's area, framed by eight sun loungers and a shaded sunken sala for long afternoons. Indoor and covered outdoor living and dining areas each seat twelve, served by a fully equipped kitchen and BBQ, with Bluetooth sound throughout and a generous beachfront lawn opening straight to the sea.

Guests also enjoy a private clubhouse with a fully equipped gym, kids' club, cinema, spa and sauna. A team of four — villa manager, private chef and housekeeping — looks after the stay, with daily breakfast, return airport transfers and a complimentary massage for bookings of four bedrooms or more. Samui Airport is four minutes away and Chaweng's restaurants and shopping just around the headland.
